treatment_information.treatment_response: Patient was comfortable post-surgery, advised on activity restrictions and rehabilitation.

treatment_timeline.event: Fell approximately 6 feet off a ladder, noted immediate back pain.
Transferred to another facility after CT revealed a 3-column spine injury at T11.
Underwent posterior instrumentation fusion at T10-L1.
Advised on post-surgery care, including activity restrictions, wound care, and medication management.

patient_outcome.follow_up_details: Follow-up appointment scheduled for 2 weeks post-operation to check the incision and take X-rays.
